title: Reference File Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for reference file frontmatter fields used in skills/*/references/*.md files.

title.description: Action-oriented title for the reference rule (e.g., 'Add Indexes on WHERE and JOIN Columns').
examples: Add Indexes on WHERE and JOIN Columns

impact.description: The impact level of this rule, indicating how much following it affects performance or correctness.

impactDescription.description: Quantified benefit of applying this rule (e.g., '100-1000x faster queries on large tables').
examples: Reduces connection overhead by up to 90%

tags.description: Keywords describing the rule as a comma-separated list of strings.
